name: GTG-1002
akas: Chinese state-sponsored (Anthropic designation); MITRE ATT&CK Campaign C0062
brief: Anthropic disrupted what it calls the first reported AI-orchestrated cyber-espionage campaign: the actor manipulated Claude Code (via a "defensive security firm" roleplay jailbreak and task decomposition) into running a largely autonomous intrusion against ~30 global targets (major tech, financial, chemical, government), succeeding in a small number. AI performed an estimated 80–90% of tactical work — reconnaissance, exploit research/writing, credential harvesting, lateral movement, and data triage/exfiltration — with only 4–6 human decision points per campaign. Anthropic
ttpMd:
**LLM-orchestrated operations** TA0002 - Execution (full kill-chain)

**LLM-informed reconnaissance** T1595 - Active Scanning

**LLM-assisted vulnerability research** T1588.006 - Obtain Capabilities: Vulnerabilities

**LLM-aided development** T1587 - Develop Capabilities

**LLM-directed Automated Collection** T1567 - Exfiltration Over Web Service
